magicfit.notes: Count-only inventory from operator report; three accounts are tracked in operator inventory, one is currently depleted, and two should be runtime-visible for new renders. Credential values stay in runtime secret stores.

omagic.notes: Count-only inventory for OMagic/Magic accounts; credential values stay in runtime secret stores.

notes: This file intentionally stores only provider account counts and aliases, never emails, passwords, API keys, or session tokens.
